zh.Stafford, Staffordshire, England: 英國斯塔福爾斯塔福德

zh.Kinderton-cum-Hulme, Cheshire, England: 英國爾金德頓 姆 赫爾姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Helena Venables於1376年出生在英國爾金德頓時，她的父親Hugh de Venables46歲，母親Margery Cotton41歲。她於1393年與Thomas de Erdeswick在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾桑登結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1448年在英國斯塔福爾斯塔福德享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Helena Venables于1376年出生在英国爾金德頓时，她的父亲Hugh de Venables46岁，母亲Margery Cotton41岁。她于1393年与Thomas de Erdeswick在英国英格兰斯塔福爾桑登结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1448年在英国斯塔福爾斯塔福德享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: Venables
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Venables (Eure), perhaps named with Late Latin venabulum ‘hunting ground’ (a derivative of venari ‘to hunt’).

variants.name: Venable
meanings: History: American bearers of this name are descended from Abraham Venables, who came to VA from England in or before 1687.

nameMeanings.name: Helena
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Helen  , used also in Germany, the Netherlands, Scandinavia, and Eastern Europe.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Helena Venables was born in 1376, in Kinderton, Cheshire, England, her father, Hugh de Venables, was 46 and her mother, Margery Cotton, was 41. She married Thomas de Erdeswick in 1393, in Sandon, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1448, in Stafford, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Helena Venables est née en 1376, à Kinderton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Hugh de Venables, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Margery Cotton, avait 41 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas d’Erdeswick en 1393, à Sandon, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1448, à Stafford, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Helena Venables 1376 in Kinderton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh de Venables 46 und ihre Mutter Margery Cotton 41. Sie hat 1393 in Sandon, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom Thomas de Erdeswick geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1448 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Stafford, Staffordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Helena Venables è nata il nel 1376 nel Kinderton, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Hugh de Venables, aveva 46 anni e sua madre, Margery Cotton, aveva 41 anni. Lei sposato Thomas de Erdeswick nel 1393, nel Sandon, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1448, nel Stafford, Staffordshire, England, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Helena Venablesが1376年にイギリスチェシュアイアキンデルトンで生まれた時，父Hugh de Venablesは46歳，母Margery Cottonは41歳であった。1393年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアサンドンでThomas de Erdeswickと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1448年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアスタフォードで72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Helena Venables(이)가 1376년 영국 체실르 킨더턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh de Venables(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery Cotton(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 1393년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 샌던에서 Thomas de Erdeswick(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1448년 영국 스태퍼드실르 스태퍼드에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Helena Venables nasceu em 1376, em Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh de Venables, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Margery Cotton, tinha 41 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas de Erdeswick em 1393, em Sandon, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1448, em Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Helena Venables родилась в 1376 г. в местности киндиртон, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Hugh de Venables было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Cotton, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas de Erdeswick в 1393 г. в местности сэндон, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1448 г. в местности стаффорд, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 72 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Helena Venables nació en 1376, en Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh de Venables, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Margery Cotton, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Thomas de Erdeswick en 1393, en Sandon, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1448, en Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 72 años.
